name: Spicy Stir-Fried Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
Main:
2 tablespoons Vegetable oil
1 small Red pepper, coarsely chopped
4 ounces Snow peas, trimmed and cut in half
3 medium Scallions, coarsely chopped
1 pound Large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1/3 cup Fresh cilantro
Mix water, soy sauce, chili sauce, and cornstarch in a measuring cup. Heat oil in a large skillet until hot but not smoking. Add bell pepper, snow peas, and scallions. Stir-fry over high heat for 3-5 minutes until tender-crisp. Reduce heat to medium-high, add shrimp, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until the shrimp start to turn bright pink and opaque. Stir sauce into skillet and bring to a boil, stirring often. Cover and cook over medium-high heat for 1-2 minutes, stirring once, until shrimp are opaque at the center. Stir in cilantro and serve immediately.
